issues.title: Stored XSS in Contact Form Plugin Admin Settings via Email Fields
issues.description: The plugin saves user input from POST parameters (cntctfrm_custom_email, cntctfrm_from_field, cntctfrm_custom_from_email) directly into WordPress options after only stripslashes() sanitization. When these options are displayed in the admin settings page, the values are echoed directly into HTML attributes without using esc_attr(), leading to stored cross-site scripting. An attacker with administrator access (or compromised admin session) can inject malicious scripts into these fields, which will execute when the settings page is viewed.

issues.title: Sql Injection in class.ShowInformationPage.php
issues.description:
在includes/pages/game/class.ShowInformationPage.php中，用户控制的jmpto参数通过HTTP::_GP获取后直接拼接到SQL查询字符串中，没有进行充分的验证或参数化处理。攻击者可以通过构造恶意参数执行任意SQL命令，导致数据库信息泄露或数据篡改。

Impact: 高危 - 虽然整数转换提供了一些保护，但字符串拼接SQL查询是危险模式，可能导致：
1. SQL注入如果整数转换被绕过
2. 逻辑错误导致数据泄露（如使用负ID访问他人记录）
3. 如果$USER['id']可被控制，直接SQL注入
4. 代码质量差，存在安全风险

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 读取了includes/pages/game/class.ShowInformationPage.php文件，确认第58-59行和第106行存在SQL字符串拼接漏洞。
2. 分析了HTTP::_GP函数（includes/classes/HTTP.class.php），确认当默认值为整数时，输入会被转换为整数，但这不足以防御SQL注入。
3. 分析了Database类（includes/classes/class.Database.php），确认没有使用参数化查询，query方法直接拼接SQL字符串。
4. 确认$TargetPlanet变量在两次SQL查询中都被直接拼接（第59行SELECT查询和第106行UPDATE查询）。

issues.title: SQL Injection in populateRangeQuery method via 'set' parameter
issues.description: The populateRangeQuery method in JDBCOAICatalog.java (and similar methods in ExtendedJDBCOAICatalog.java, JDBCLimitedOAICatalog.java, NewJDBCOAICatalog.java) directly concatenates user-controlled 'set' parameter into SQL query string without proper sanitization or parameterization. The method uses a StringTokenizer to parse SQL query templates (rangeQuery or rangeSetQuery) and appends the 'set' parameter directly when encountering 's' token (line 377). This allows attackers to inject malicious SQL code through the 'set' parameter in OAI-PMH ListIdentifiers or ListRecords requests.

issues.title: Xss in a-forms.php
issues.description:
The 'aform_css_file_selector' AJAX handler (lines 223-228) directly outputs the content of a CSS file specified by the user via the 'css_file_selection' POST parameter. The file path is constructed using esc_html() on the user input, which only escapes HTML characters but does not prevent path traversal attacks.

Impact: 认证用户可以读取服务器上的任意文件，包括：
1. WordPress 配置文件 (wp-config.php) - 包含数据库凭证
2. 系统文件 (/etc/passwd)
3. 其他敏感文件
如果读取的文件包含恶意 JavaScript 代码，当内容被输出到页面时可能导致 XSS。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: echo(@file_get_contents(get_template_directory()."/aforms_css/".esc_html($_POST["css_file_selection"])));
污点在此传播/转换: echo(@file_get_contents(get_template_directory()."/aforms_css/".esc_html($_POST["css_file_selection"])));
危险操作在此触发: echo(@file_get_contents(get_template_directory()."/aforms_css/".esc_html($_POST["css_file_selection"])));

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 读取 a-forms.php 文件确认漏洞代码存在（第 226 行）。
2. 分析 esc_html() 函数行为：该函数只转义 HTML 特殊字符（<, >, &, ", '），不过滤路径遍历字符（../, ..\\）。
3. 编写测试代码验证路径遍历 payload 如 '../../../wp-config.php' 可以通过 esc_html() 而不被过滤。
4. 确认文件内容被直接输出到响应中，如果文件包含恶意 JavaScript 代码会导致 XSS。
5. 检查权限：该 AJAX 端点使用 wp_ajax_ 前缀，需要用户认证，但没有额外的权限检查。

issues.title: Sql Injection in index.php
issues.description:
The application directly concatenates user-controlled sort and direction parameters into SQL ORDER BY clause without proper sanitization or parameterization. This allows attackers to inject arbitrary SQL code through the

Impact: Critical - Attacker can execute arbitrary SQL commands including:
1. Extract all data from database (SQLite database file: sample.db)
2. Delete or modify database tables (DROP TABLE, DELETE, UPDATE)
3. Execute multiple SQL statements separated by ;
4. Perform UNION-based attacks to extract data from other tables
5. Perform time-based blind SQL injection to extract data character by character
6. Potentially execute system commands if SQLite has dangerous functions enabled

issues.ai_explanation:
1. Read demo/index.php file to confirm vulnerable code pattern
2. Created Python Fuzzing Harness to simulate vulnerable PHP code
3. Tested multiple SQL injection payloads including:
   - Multiple statement injection: asc; DROP TABLE sample;--
   - UNION-based injection: asc UNION SELECT * FROM users--
   - Quote escaping in sort parameter: id\" OR 1=1--
   - Time-based blind SQLi: asc AND (SELECT SLEEP(5))--
4. Confirmed direction parameter is outside quotes, allowing direct SQL injection
5. Confirmed sort parameter can escape quotes with \" character
6. No input validation, sanitization, or parameterization found

            "`RETURN_C

issues.title: Xss in index.js
issues.description:
The naughtyHref function uses regex /^([a-z]+)\:/ which only matches lowercase letters. This can be bypassed with uppercase letters, whitespace, or hex encoding in scheme names like 'JavaScript:', 'java script:', or 'javascript:'.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过大小写变体（JavaScript:）、空格插入（java script:）、编码字符（javascript:）等方式绕过href属性验证，注入恶意javascript: URL，导致跨站脚本攻击（XSS）。当用户点击恶意链接时，可以执行任意JavaScript代码，窃取cookie、会话令牌或进行其他恶意操作。

Nodes.Desc: 危险操作在此触发: var matches = href.match(/^([a-z]+)\:/);

issues.ai_explanation: 通过分析naughtyHref函数代码确认漏洞：1) 正则表达式/^([a-z]+)\:/只匹配小写字母 2) 'JavaScript:'、'JAVASCRIPT:'、'java script:'等变体无法匹配 3) 匹配失败时函数返回false（认为安全），但实际上这些是危险的javascript: URL。测试文件test/test.js第32行显示'HTTPS://google.com'被允许通过，证实了大写scheme的绕过。

issues.ai_explanation: 读取了文件 php/service/remotehtml/ErrorReportingRemoteHTMLContentBuilder.php 和 php/data_access/RemoteHtmlContentDataAccess.php，确认代码逻辑。使用 run_code 执行 Python Fuzzing Harness，模拟 PHP 代码中变量插值和 pg_query_params 调用。测试了 6 种 payload，其中 4 种触发了 SQL 注入检测（包含 SQL 关键字或特殊字符）。关键发现：1) $name 直接插入双引号 SQL 字符串中；2) getForQueryString 调用时 $params 参数为空数组；3) 这使得用户输入成为 SQL 语法的一部分，而非参数值。

issues.ai_explanation: Created a Python Fuzzing Harness that simulates PHP's addslashes() function and tests various SQL injection payloads. The test confirmed that addslashes() only escapes quotes but does not prevent all SQL injection attacks. Payloads like '" OR "1"="1' -- ' can bypass addslashes() protection when concatenated directly into SQL queries with double quotes. The harness tested 7 different payloads, with 3 successfully bypassing the filter.

		    if ( is_callable( 'exif_read_data' ) )

				<table>';

				}
				$message_text .= '</table>
				<h4>Active Plugins</h4>
				<table>';

					$message_text .= '<tr><td scope="row">'. $key .'</td><td scope="row">'. $value .'</td></tr>';	
				}
				$message_text .= '</table>
				<h4>Inactive Plugins</h4>
				<table>';
				foreach ( $system_info['inactive_plugins'] as $key => $value ) {
					$message_text .= '<tr><td scope="row">'. $key .'</td><td scope="row">'. $value .'</td></tr>';
				}
				$message_text .= '</table></body></html>';
				$result = wp_mail( $email, 'System Info From ' . $home_url, $message_text, $headers );
				if ( $result != true )
					$error = __( "Sorry, email message could not be delivered.", 'bestwebsoft' );
			}
		} ?>

issues.title: Multiple Reflected XSS Vulnerabilities in MaxButtons WordPress Plugin
issues.description: The MaxButtons WordPress plugin contains multiple reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in the includes/maxbuttons-button.php file. The $button_id variable is directly assigned from $_GET['id'] without proper sanitization or escaping, and is then output in multiple dangerous contexts: 1) JavaScript context (window.location) at line 196, 2) HTML href attributes at lines 904-906, and 3) HTML text context at line 911. This allows attackers to inject malicious scripts that execute in the context of the victim's browser when they visit a specially crafted URL containing malicious payload in the 'id' parameter.

issues.title: Xss in tables.py
issues.description:
The get_zone_hosts function in openstack_dashboard/dashboards/admin/aggregates/tables.py uses string formatting with host names (zone.hosts dictionary keys) that may be user-controlled. The function uses % formatting without HTML escaping, and the output is rendered through Django's unordered_list filter which does not automatically escape HTML content.

Impact: Stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows administrators with compute node access to inject malicious JavaScript that will execute when other administrators view the availability zones page. While requiring administrator privileges for exploitation, it poses an internal threat risk and could be used in privilege escalation attacks or to compromise administrator accounts.

issues.title: Command Injection in set_version
issues.description:
sed command directly embeds user-provided MYVERSION variable without proper escaping, could allow command injection if MYVERSION contains sed command separators

Impact: Medium - can corrupt output files by breaking sed patterns, causing script failure or malformed files. Cannot execute shell commands.

Nodes.Desc:
用户可控数据在此进入: while test $# -gt 0; do
  case $1 in
    *-version)
      MYVERSION="$2"
      shift
    ;;
    *-file)
      FILES="$FI
Nodes.code:
while test $# -gt 0; do
  case $1 in
    *-version)
      MYVERSION="$2"
      shift
    ;;
    *-file)
      FILES="$FILES ${2##*/}"
      shift
    ;;
    *-basename)
      BASENAME="$2"
      shift
    ;;
    *-outdir)
      MYOUTDIR="$2"
      shift
    ;;
    *)
      echo Unknown parameter $1.
      echo 'Usage: set_version --version $VERSION --file $FILE --basename $BASENAME --outdir $OUT'
      exit 1
    ;;
  esac
  shift
done

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: sed "0,/^Version:\(\s*\)[^%]*/s//Version:\1$MYVERSION/" "$FILE" > "$MYOUTDIR/$FILE" || exit 1
危险操作在此触发: sed "0,/^Version:\(\s*\)[^%]*/s//Version:\1$MYVERSION/" "$FILE" > "$MYOUTDIR/$FILE" || exit 1

issues.ai_explanation: Tested with MYVERSION values containing sed special characters: '2.0.0;echo INJECTED', '2.0.0/evil', '2.0.0\nmalicious'. Confirmed that '/' breaks sed pattern, ';' is treated as literal, newlines create multiple lines. This is sed command injection (pattern corruption) not shell command injection.

issues.title: Xss in application.py
issues.description:
Fava v1.22之前版本存在反射型XSS漏洞（CVE-2022-2514）。攻击者可以构造包含恶意JavaScript代码的time或filter参数，当参数无效时，错误消息会包含这些未转义的用户输入。具体漏洞链：
1. 用户通过URL参数time和filter输入恶意代码
2. TimeFilter.set()方法在解析失败时抛出FavaAPIException，错误消息包含用户输入：'Invalid time filter: {user_input}'
3. 错误处理器将错误消息传递给模板
4. 模板使用|safe过滤器渲染，导致恶意代码直接输出到HTML页面

Impact: 攻击者可以构造恶意URL，当用户访问时执行任意JavaScript代码。可能导致：
1. 窃取用户会话cookie
2. 重定向到恶意网站
3. 执行恶意操作（如转账、修改数据）
4. 窃取敏感信息
由于是反射型XSS，需要用户点击恶意链接，但结合社工攻击危害较大。

Nodes.Desc:
用户可控数据在此进入: g.filtered = ledger.get_filtered(
            account=request.args.get("account"),
            filter=request.args.get("

污点在此传播/转换: if not self.begin_date:
            self.value = None
            raise FilterException("time", f"Failed to parse date:
Nodes.code:
if not self.begin_date:
            self.value = None
            raise FilterException("time", f"Failed to parse date: {value}")
        return True

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 读取src/fava/application.py确认从request.args获取time和filter参数
2. 读取src/fava/core/filters.py确认TimeFilter.set()方法将用户输入嵌入错误消息
3. 读取src/fava/application.py确认错误处理器将error.message传递给模板
4. 读取src/fava/templates/_layout.html确认模板使用{{ content|safe }}渲染，禁用HTML转义
5. 编写Python Fuzzing Harness模拟完整漏洞链，测试多种XSS payload，确认恶意代码原样输出
6. 验证AdvancedFilter.set()方法也存在同样问题（第396行：exception.message = exception.message + value）

issues.title: Stored Cross-Site Scripting (Xss) in admin.py
issues.description:
在users/admin.py中使用mark_safe函数处理未净化的用户输入（username、first_name、last_name），当这些字段包含恶意脚本时，在管理员界面中会被执行，导致存储型XSS攻击。

Impact: 高危漏洞。攻击者可通过恶意用户名或组名注入JavaScript代码，当管理员查看用户组警告消息时执行。可导致：1) 窃取管理员会话cookie，完全控制管理员账户；2) 执行任意管理员操作（添加/删除用户、修改权限等）；3) 植入后门；4) 横向移动攻击其他系统。

- {user.username} is member of: ' for idx, group in enumerate(user.group
危险操作在此触发: warning_message = mark_safe(_(f'The following users are members of multiple groups:'
Nodes.code:
warning_message = mark_safe(_(f'The following users are members of multiple groups:'
                                          f'{warning_message}'))

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 使用read_file确认文件存在且代码匹配；2. 编写Python Fuzzing Harness模拟漏洞场景；3. 验证当username或group.name包含恶意脚本时，mark_safe函数会原样输出未转义的HTML；4. 确认漏洞在管理员界面中可利用。

issues.title: Code Injection in Devel.js
issues.description:
在Devel.js文件中，ac_draw_io变量包含不安全的https://ajax.googleapis.com域名。该域名在CSP配置中被允许，可能使攻击者能够注入恶意脚本。代码中的TODO注释明确指示需要移除该域名，确认了这是一个已知的安全问题。

Impact: 中等风险。如果攻击者能够控制ajax.googleapis.com域名或相关子域名，可以注入恶意脚本，导致XSS攻击、数据窃取或会话劫持。虽然ajax.googleapis.com是Google的官方CDN，相对安全，但允许外部域名增加了攻击面。TODO注释表明开发者已意识到此风险。

issues.title: Code Injection in __main__.py
issues.description:
在nuitka/__main__.py第45行，eval()函数直接执行了os.environ["NUITKA_PYTHONPATH"]的环境变量值。攻击者可以通过设置NUITKA_PYTHONPATH环境变量来注入任意Python代码，导致远程代码执行。该漏洞与CVE-2022-2054类似。

Impact: 远程代码执行(RCE)。攻击者可以通过控制环境变量执行任意系统命令，包括文件读写、网络访问、进程控制等。在CI/CD流水线、容器环境、共享主机或任何用户可以设置环境变量的场景中风险极高。

Nodes.Desc:
用户可控数据在此进入: if "NUITKA_PYTHONPATH" in os.environ:
        # Restore the PYTHONPATH gained from the site module, that we chose not
Nodes.code:
if "NUITKA_PYTHONPATH" in os.environ:
        # Restore the PYTHONPATH gained from the site module, that we chose not
        # to have imported. pylint: disable=eval-used
        sys.path = eval(os.environ["NUITKA_PYTHONPATH"])

Nodes.Desc: 危险操作在此触发: sys.path = eval(os.environ["NUITKA_PYTHONPATH"])

issues.ai_explanation: 通过Fuzzing Harness验证，设置恶意环境变量如"__import__('os').system('echo VULNERABLE')"和"[__import__('os').system('id')]"，eval成功执行了系统命令。测试输出显示命令成功执行（'VULNERABLE'被打印，'id'命令返回用户ID）。确认攻击者可通过控制NUITKA_PYTHONPATH环境变量执行任意Python代码。

issues.title: Ssrf in index.js
issues.description:
The parse-url library uses normalize-url ^7.0.3 which may contain SSRF vulnerabilities. When the normalize parameter is true, user-controlled URLs are passed to normalizeUrl function. Additionally, the GIT_RE regular exp

Impact: 无实际影响。parse-url 库本身不会发起网络请求，因此不会导致 SSRF。
issues.ai_explanation: 分析了 lib/index.js 中的 parseUrl 函数。该函数仅解析 URL 并返回解析后的对象，不发起任何 HTTP 请求。即使 normalize-url 库存在漏洞，parse-url 库本身也不会导致 SSRF，因为它只是一个 URL 解析器。SSRF 需要应用程序使用解析后的 URL 发起请求，这超出了库的控制范围。

issues.title: Xss in index.js
issues.description:
parse-url 6.0.2版本存在存储型跨站脚本(XSS)漏洞，对应CVE-2022-2218。攻击者可以构造包含恶意脚本和换行符(\r\r或\r)的URL，绕过normalize-url库的过滤。parseUrl函数解析此类URL后返回包含恶意内容的对象，当应用程序将这些内容存储后输出到HTML时，会导致XSS攻击。修复提交21c72a4试图解决此问题，但换行符处理仍可能被绕过。

Impact: 攻击者可构造恶意URL，当应用程序使用parse-url库解析并存储结果，随后将解析内容输出到HTML时，可执行任意JavaScript代码，导致存储型XSS攻击。可能窃取用户会话、重定向到恶意网站、窃取敏感信息等。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: function parseUrl(url, normalize = false) {
污点在此传播/转换: url = normalizeUrl(url, normalize)

危险操作在此触发: const parsed = parsePath(url)
    return parsed;

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 确认lib/index.js文件存在，包含parseUrl函数。2. 分析函数逻辑：接收URL参数，可选调用normalizeUrl规范化，然后调用parsePath解析。3. 根据CVE-2022-2218描述，parse-url 6.0.2版本存在存储型XSS漏洞，攻击者可通过包含换行符和恶意脚本的URL绕过normalize-url过滤。4. 当前项目版本为5.0.8，但依赖的normalize-url为^6.1.0，parse-path为^4.0.4，漏洞可能存在于依赖中。5. 由于沙箱环境限制无法动态验证，但基于CVE描述和代码分析判断漏洞很可能存在。

issues.title: Code Injection in GravExtension.php
issues.description:
The evaluateTwigFunc (line 972) and evaluateStringFunc (line 991) functions create new Twig environments and directly execute user-provided template code without enabling security features like autoescape or sandbox mode

Impact: 中风险XSS漏洞：攻击者可注入恶意脚本，但需要用户访问包含dump()输出的页面。Twig代码注入风险较低，因为用户输入不作为Twig代码执行。
issues.ai_explanation: 1. 确认evaluateTwigFunc和evaluateStringFunc函数确实创建了新的Twig环境而没有显式设置autoescape或sandbox安全特性。2. evaluateStringFunc使用已废弃的Twig_Loader_String，存在安全风险。3. dump()函数调用evaluateTwigFunc并渲染debugger模板。4. debugger模板使用|raw过滤器，会禁用autoescape，但这是XSS漏洞而非Twig代码注入。5. 用户输入通过模板变量传递给dump()函数，但作为数据显示而非Twig代码执行。6. evaluateStringFunc在代码库中未找到调用点，可能未被使用。

issues.title: Command Injection in editor.go
issues.description:
在 GetDiffPreview 函数中，treePath 参数未经充分验证直接传递给 exec.Command 执行 git diff 命令。攻击者可以构造恶意 treePath 参数（如 "; rm -rf /" 或 "$(malicious_command)"）来执行任意系统命令。treePath 参数来自用户输入的 c.Repo.TreePath，完全用户可控。

Impact: 高危漏洞：1. 路径遍历允许在服务器任意位置写入文件，可能导致远程代码执行（如写入 cron job、ssh key 等）。2. 虽然 Go 的 exec.Command 缓解了传统命令注入，但 git 命令选项可能被滥用。3. 攻击者可以覆盖系统关键文件或写入恶意脚本。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: treePath := c.Repo.TreePath
污点在此传播/转换: func (repo *Repository) GetDiffPreview(branch, treePath, content string) (diff *gitutil.Diff, err error) {
Nodes.code: func (repo *Repository) GetDiffPreview(branch, treePath, content string) (diff *gitutil.Diff, err error) {

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: filePath := path.Join(localPath, treePath)
危险操作在此触发: cmd := exec.Command("git", "diff", treePath)

issues.ai_explanation: 验证了以下内容：1. 读取了 internal/route/repo/editor.go 文件，确认 DiffPreviewPost 函数中 treePath 直接来自 c.Repo.TreePath，未经过 pathutil.Clean 清理（与其他函数不同）。2. 读取了 internal/db/repo_editor.go 文件，确认 GetDiffPreview 函数中 treePath 直接传递给 exec.Command("git", "diff", treePath)。3. 通过 Python Fuzzing Harness 测试，确认 Go 的 exec.Command 不调用 shell，缓解了传统命令注入，但路径遍历仍然存在。4. 验证了 path.Join(localPath, treePath) 存在路径遍历漏洞，允许写入任意文件。5. 确认 treePath 未经过适当验证，攻击者可以使用 '../' 遍历路径。

issues.title: Reflected Xss in PageDiff.php
issues.description:
The difftype parameter from user input is reflected in HTML output without proper encoding, leading to cross-site scripting. The vulnerability exists in the show() method where $difftype is echoed without using hsc() function.

Impact: Attackers can execute arbitrary JavaScript in the context of the victim's session, potentially stealing session cookies, performing actions on behalf of the user, or defacing the site. The vulnerability is reflected XSS, requiring the victim to click a malicious link.

Nodes.Desc:
用户可控数据在此进入: if ($INPUT->has('difftype')) {
            $this->preference['difftype'] = $INPUT->str('difftype');
污点在此传播/转换: $this->preference['difftype'] = $INPUT->str('difftype');
危险操作在此触发: echo '<table class="diff diff_'.$this->preference['difftype'] .'">';

issues.ai_explanation: Created a Python Fuzzing Harness to simulate the vulnerable code path. Tested multiple XSS payloads including '<script>alert(1)</script>', '" onmouseover="alert(1)', and others. All payloads were reflected unescaped in the HTML output, confirming the XSS vulnerability. The str() method only applies stripctl filter which removes control characters (0x00-0x1F) but does not encode HTML special characters. The difftype parameter is directly concatenated into HTML attribute without using hsc() or similar encoding function.

issues.title: Xss in bills.inc.php
issues.description:
bill_name字段存在存储型XSS漏洞。用户输入的bill_name通过$_POST直接存储到数据库，随后在编辑表单中通过echo直接输出到HTML value属性，没有进行HTML实体转义。攻击者可以提交包含恶意脚本的账单名称，当管理员或其他用户查看或编辑该账单时，脚本将在其浏览器中执行。

Impact: 存储型XSS，攻击者可以窃取管理员会话cookie、执行任意操作、钓鱼攻击、键盘记录等。由于是存储型，影响持久且广泛，所有查看/编辑该账单的用户都会受影响。

issues.title: Xss in Xml2Js.java
issues.description:
The Xml2Js build tool contains a stored XSS vulnerability in the encodeURIComponent method that improperly replaces URL-encoded characters back to their original form, particularly single quotes (%27). When XML files containing malicious JavaScript payloads are processed, the encoded single quotes are decoded, allowing JavaScript injection in the output.

Impact: Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability with high impact. Attackers can inject malicious JavaScript code into XML files. When processed by Xml2Js, the code will be decoded and embedded into output JavaScript files. These JS files are likely served to users' browsers, leading to arbitrary JavaScript execution in the context of the application. This can result in session hijacking, credential theft, CSRF token theft, defacement, or other client-side attacks.

							.substring(basePath.length() + 1);
					result.add(
							"f['" + name + "']

issues.ai_explanation: Created a test Python program that replicates the vulnerable encodeURIComponent method from Xml2Js.java. Tested with various XSS payloads containing encoded single quotes (%27). The method incorrectly decodes %27 to ', allowing JavaScript injection when the output is used in JavaScript string contexts. Proof of concept shows that input ';alert('XSS');//' becomes '';alert('XSS');//'' after processing, which would execute the alert() in a JS context. The vulnerability is confirmed through both dynamic testing and static analysis of the code flow.

issues.title: Open Redirect in auth_form.py
issues.description:
The application uses user-controlled request path information to construct redirect URLs without proper validation. When a user attempts to access a protected page with a malicious path (e.g., '//evil.com/path'), the path is encoded and stored for later redirection, potentially leading to open redirect vulnerabilities.

Impact: 攻击者可以构造恶意链接，诱骗用户点击后重定向到恶意网站，用于网络钓鱼攻击或传播恶意软件。如果与XSS结合，危害更大。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: original_url = urllib.parse.quote(request.path_info, encoding=uri_encoding)
污点在此传播/转换: new_url = cherrypy.url(original_url, qs=qs, base='')
污点在此传播/转换: cherrypy.session[LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL] = new_url
危险操作在此触发: raise cherrypy.HTTPRedirect(self._get_redirect_url())

issues.ai_explanation: 通过读取文件分析了完整的代码流程，编写了 Fuzzing Harness 测试了多种攻击向量（包括 '//evil.com/path', '/%2fevil.com/path' 等）。验证发现：1) request.path_info 用户可控；2) urllib.parse.quote() 仅编码不验证；3) 编码后的 URL 被存储并用于重定向；4) 如果 path_info 包含 '//evil.com'，经过编码/解码后可能仍然保持为协议相对 URL。需要进一步验证 CherryPy 的重定向实现是否进行安全检查。

issues.title: Ssrf in index.js
issues.description:
The makeDispatcher function in index.js uses user-controlled opts.path as the first argument to new URL() with util.parseOrigin(url) as the base. When a user provides a path starting with '//' (e.g., '//127.0.0.1'), the resulting URL can point to internal services, leading to SSRF.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过控制 opts.path 参数构造指向内部服务的 URL，包括：1) 本地服务 (127.0.0.1, localhost)，2) 内网服务 (192.168.x.x, 10.x.x.x)，3) 云元数据服务 (169.254.169.254)，4) 其他内部基础设施。这可能导致敏感信息泄露、内部服务探测、或作为攻击内部系统的跳板。

Nodes.Desc: 危险操作在此触发: url = new URL(opts.path, util.parseOrigin(url))

issues.ai_explanation: Extracted the makeDispatcher function and created a test harness to simulate the vulnerability. Tested various malicious inputs for opts.path parameter. Confirmed that when opts.path starts with '//' (protocol-relative URL), the new URL() constructor combines it with the base URL's origin to create URLs pointing to internal services (127.0.0.1, localhost, AWS metadata service, etc.).

issues.ai_explanation: 通过读取文件确认代码存在，编写PHP Fuzzing Harness测试trim()函数对路径遍历payload的防护效果。测试证实trim($tpl, "./")只移除开头和结尾的字符，不会移除字符串中间的'../'序列，攻击者可以构造如'../../../etc/passwd'的payload绕过防护。

issues.title: Xss in translation.js

Impact: 攻击者可以通过翻译管理功能注入恶意JavaScript代码，当其他用户查看包含该翻译的页面时，代码会被执行，可能导致会话劫持、数据窃取或恶意操作。
issues.ai_explanation: 通过编写JavaScript Fuzzing Harness，测试了20种不同的XSS payload。发现replace_html_event_attributes函数的正则表达式/ on[^=]+=/g存在以下问题：1) 需要空格before 'on'，可被<divonclick="...">绕过；2) 不区分大小写，无法过滤<diV ONCLICK="...">；3) 无法过滤其他危险属性如href="javascript:"、style="background:url(javascript:...)"。strip_tags函数允许特定标签但保留所有属性，与有缺陷的replace_html_event_attributes组合导致XSS漏洞。

issues.title: Open Redirect in other.php
issues.description:
The redirect() method in UrlManager.php checks if the URL host matches site_hostname(), but this check may be bypassable. Although the current code appears to have hostname validation, CVE-2022-2252 indicates an open red

Impact: If a bypass exists, attackers could redirect users to malicious sites, potentially facilitating phishing attacks. However, the current validation logic appears to restrict redirects to the same hostname.
issues.ai_explanation: The UrlManager::redirect() method contains host validation: it checks if the parsed URL host equals site_hostname(). If not, it redirects to site_url() (homepage). Additional sanitization is performed by HTMLClean which uses HTMLPurifier with URI.DisableExternal=true and URI.Host=site_hostname(). This appears to prevent open redirects. However, without dynamic PHP testing, certain edge cases cannot be fully validated. The mention of CVE-2022-2252 suggests there might be a bypass, but the exact vulnerability details could not be confirmed from the codebase.

issues.title: Path Traversal in dispatch.py
issues.description:
The static() function in rdiffweb/controller/dispatch.py is vulnerable to path traversal attacks. The security check `assert filename.startswith(path)` on line 122 is insufficient because it can be bypassed when user-controlled input contains path traversal sequences like '../'.

Impact: Attackers can read arbitrary files on the server filesystem that are accessible to the web server process. This could include sensitive files like /etc/passwd, configuration files, source code, or database credentials. The impact is limited to files readable by the web server user.

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: def handler(*args, **kwargs):
污点在此传播/转换: filename = os.path.join(path, *args)
危险操作在此触发: return serve_file(filename, content_type)

issues.ai_explanation: 1. Extracted the static() function from rdiffweb/controller/dispatch.py. 2. Created a Fuzzing Harness to test the path traversal vulnerability. 3. Verified that the security check `assert filename.startswith(path)` is insufficient. 4. Demonstrated that path traversal sequences like '../etc/passwd' bypass the check because os.path.join('/base/path', '../etc/passwd') produces '/base/path/../etc/passwd' which starts with '/base/path', but when normalized becomes '/base/etc/passwd' which escapes the base directory. 5. Tested multiple payloads including '../etc/passwd', '../../../etc/passwd', and 'css/../../etc/passwd' - all successfully bypassed the check.

issues.title: XSS in Editor() function due to improper sanitization in parse()
issues.description: The parse() function in src/plugins/editor.js has improper attribute filtering logic that allows XSS payloads to bypass sanitization. The function uses 'var numAttributes = element.attributes.length - 1' and 'if (numAttributes > 0)' which causes attributes not to be processed when an element has 0 or 1 attributes. This allows malicious attributes like onclick, onmouseover, etc. to remain in the HTML. User-controlled HTML from clipboard paste is processed by the filter() function which calls parse(), but due to the flawed logic, dangerous attributes are not removed. The unsanitized HTML is then inserted into the DOM via innerHTML or document.execCommand('insertHtml'), leading to XSS.

issues.title: Xss in queryads.php
issues.description:
The queryads.php file contains an XSS vulnerability where user-controlled input from the 'domain' GET parameter is directly output in Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream without proper encoding. When validDomain() validation fails, $url is output in error message.

Impact: 中危 - 潜在的 DOM-based XSS。如果前端 JavaScript 不安全地处理 SSE 数据（例如使用 innerHTML），攻击者可能执行任意 JavaScript。利用条件较苛刻，需要前端实现缺陷。
issues.ai_explanation: 分析了 echoEvent() 函数和 SSE 输出机制。echoEvent() 不进行 HTML 编码，直接输出用户输入。当 validDomain() 验证失败时，$url 被直接输出到错误消息中。然而，SSE 流（Content-Type: text/event-stream）通常不会被浏览器作为 HTML 解析，EventSource API 不会执行数据字段中的 HTML/JS。漏洞利用取决于前端如何消费 SSE 数据。如果前端错误地使用 innerHTML 或其他不安全方式处理数据，可能导致 DOM-based XSS。

在src/openforms/templates/cookie_consent/cookiegroup_list.html模板中，第6行使用`{% firstof request.GET.referer request.headers.referer as referer %}`获取referer参数，该参数直接来自用户输入（GET参数或HTTP头）。第26行直接使用`{{ referer }}`作为链接的href属性值，没有进行任何验证

Impact: 攻击者可以利用此漏洞进行钓鱼攻击，诱骗用户访问恶意网站并输入敏感信息。也可以使用javascript:协议执行任意JavaScript代码，可能窃取用户cookie或执行其他恶意操作。虽然需要用户交互（点击按钮），但攻击者可以通过社会工程学诱使用户点击。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: {% firstof request.GET.referer request.headers.referer as referer %}
危险操作在此触发: <a href="{{ referer }}" class="button button--primary">

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 读取模板文件确认代码存在；2. 编写Python脚本模拟Django模板渲染，测试多种恶意输入（外部域名、JavaScript协议、协议相对URL等）；3. 确认referer参数直接用作href属性值，没有任何验证；4. 验证攻击者可以构造恶意链接进行钓鱼攻击或执行JavaScript代码

issues.title: DOM-based XSS in Recently Viewed Projects Feature
issues.description: The feature displays recently viewed Scratch projects by fetching data from the Scratch API and directly inserting the project title into innerHTML without proper sanitization. An attacker can create a project with a malicious title containing JavaScript code (e.g., ), which will execute in the browser of any user who views their recently viewed projects. This can lead to session theft, account takeover, or other malicious actions.

issues.title: Sql Injection in PgResultSet.java
issues.description: The refreshRow method in PgResultSet constructs a SQL query by directly appending column names and primary key names obtained from database metadata without proper escaping. If an attacker can create tables with malicious column names, SQL injection can occur.

Nodes.Desc:
危险操作在此触发: selectStatement = connection.prepareStatement(sqlText,
          ResultSet.TYPE_SCROLL_INSENSITIVE, ResultSet.CONCUR_UPD

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 读取了 refreshRow 方法的完整实现（行 1380-1480）
2. 分析了 SQL 查询构建逻辑：列名和主键名直接拼接到 SQL 字符串中
3. 编写了 Java Fuzzing Harness 测试，确认恶意列名会导致 SQL 注入
4. 测试了多种攻击场景：
   - 列名包含 SQL 语句：'email FROM users; DROP TABLE users; --'
   - 主键名包含 UNION 注入：'id UNION SELECT * FROM admin --'
5. 确认即使使用双引号引用标识符，如果列名包含未转义的双引号，仍然可能发生注入

issues.title: Sql Injection in SmartyCacheResourceMysql.php
issues.description:
在Smarty_CacheResource_Mysql类的save方法中，用户提供的$content参数通过pSQL函数转义后直接拼接到SQL REPLACE语句中。虽然使用了pSQL函数进行转义，但转义可能不充分，特别是在某些数据库配置或字符集下。攻击者可以通过构造恶意的缓存内容实现SQL注入攻击。CVE-2022-31181的patch修改了第90行的pSQL($content, true)调用，证实了该漏洞的存在。

Impact: 高危SQL注入漏洞，攻击者可通过恶意缓存内容执行任意SQL语句，导致：1. 数据库信息泄露（提取敏感数据）；2. 数据篡改或删除；3. 权限提升；4. 缓存污染影响系统稳定性。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: protected function save($id, $name, $cache_id, $compile_id, $exp_time, $content)
污点在此传播/转换: "' . pSQL($content, true) . '"

危险操作在此触发: Db::getInstance()->execute('
		REPLACE INTO ' . _DB_PREFIX_ . 'smarty_cache (id_smarty_cache, name, cache_id, content)
Nodes.code:
Db::getInstance()->execute('
		REPLACE INTO ' . _DB_PREFIX_ . 'smarty_cache (id_smarty_cache, name, cache_id, content)
		VALUES (
			"' . pSQL($id, true) . '",
			"' . pSQL(sha1($name)) . '",
			"' . pSQL($cache_id, true) . '",
			"' . pSQL($content, true) . '"
		)');

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 确认文件classes/Smarty/SmartyCacheResourceMysql.php存在且包含save方法。
2. 分析第90行代码使用pSQL($content, true)进行转义。
3. 追踪pSQL函数实现，发现其调用Db::getInstance()->escape()，最终使用_escape方法进行简单的字符串替换。
4. 测试显示pSQL能转义常见特殊字符（单引号、双引号、反斜杠等）。
5. 但CVE-2022-31181表明在实际环境中，由于字符集问题（如GBK/GB2312宽字符注入）或其他上下文因素，转义可能被绕过。
6. 漏洞对应已知CVE，且修复补丁修改了第90行的pSQL调用，进一步证实漏洞存在。

issues.title: Sql Injection in AbstractListing.php
issues.description:
The AbstractListing class contains SQL injection vulnerabilities in the setOrderKey and setGroupBy methods. The isValidOrderKey method always returns true, providing no validation for order key values. When $quote parameter is false, user input is directly stored without validation or escaping, leading to SQL injection when used in ORDER BY or GROUP BY clauses.

Impact: High impact SQL injection vulnerability. Attackers can execute arbitrary SQL commands including data deletion (DROP TABLE), data exfiltration (UNION SELECT), authentication bypass, and database takeover. Affects all Pimcore applications using AbstractListing classes for database queries.
issues.ai_explanation: Created a Python Fuzzing Harness that mimics the vulnerable code flow: 1) setOrderKey() receives user input, 2) isValidOrderKey() always returns true (no validation), 3) orderKey values are stored, 4) getOrder() method concatenates values directly into SQL ORDER BY clause. Tested with quote=false (direct injection) and quote=true (backtick-wrapped). Both scenarios allow SQL injection. Also verified setGroupBy() has same vulnerability.

issues.title: Path Traversal in ZipUtils.java
issues.description:
ZipUtils.unzipFilesToPath方法中的Zip Slip检测逻辑存在缺陷。第71行使用f.getCanonicalPath().startsWith(destinationDir)进行检查，但destinationDir参数未进行规范化处理。如果destinationDir包含相对路径（如'/tmp/test/../'），而ZIP条目名也包含路径遍历序列（如'../../etc/passwd'），则f.getCanonicalPath().startsWith(destinationDir)检查可能失败，导致文件被拒绝

Impact: 主要影响是功能性缺陷：当destinationDir参数包含相对路径组件（如'..'或'.'）时，合法ZIP条目可能被错误拒绝。安全影响较低：实际Zip Slip绕过（允许恶意文件写入目标目录外）的可能性较小，但代码逻辑不完整，存在潜在风险。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: public static void unzipFilesToPath(String jarPath, String destinationDir) throws IOException {
Nodes.code: public static void unzipFilesToPath(String jarPath, String destinationDir) throws IOException {

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: String fileName = destinationDir + File.separator + entry.getName();
危险操作在此触发: if (!f.getCanonicalPath().startsWith(destinationDir)) {

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 读取了完整的ZipUtils.java文件，确认代码逻辑。
2. 分析了unzipFilesToPath方法，发现第71行使用f.getCanonicalPath().startsWith(destinationDir)进行检查。
3. 通过模拟测试发现：当destinationDir包含相对路径组件（如'..'或'.'）时，检查可能失败，导致合法文件被拒绝（假阴性）。
4. 测试了多种攻击场景，包括destinationDir为'/'、包含'..'组件、ZIP条目包含路径遍历序列等。
5. 发现安全绕过（假阳性）的可能性较低，但代码逻辑确实存在缺陷：destinationDir应该先规范化再进行比较。
6. 搜索了项目中对unzipFilesToPath的调用，发现都使用getAbsolutePath()作为destinationDir参数，getAbsolutePath()可能返回包含'..'的路径。

issues.title: Open Redirect in ControlledVocabularyServlet.java

issues.title: Remote Command Injection in fileupload.ccc CGI Script
issues.description: The fileupload.ccc CGI script contains a critical command injection vulnerability at line 24. The code 'eval $(echo ${QUERY_STRING//&/;})' directly executes the QUERY_STRING environment variable as shell commands. The parameter substitution ${QUERY_STRING//&/;} replaces '&' characters with ';', transforming URL query parameters into shell command syntax. This allows attackers to craft malicious HTTP requests with QUERY_STRING containing shell metacharacters (;, |, &, $, `, etc.) to execute arbitrary commands. According to CVE-2022-24796 advisory, commands execute as root, leading to complete system compromise. The vulnerability affects RaspberryMatic versions from 2.31.25.20180428 until 3.61.7.20220226.

issues.title: Ssrf in SalesChannelProxyController.php
issues.description:
SalesChannelProxyController.php中的proxy()方法接收用户控制的`_path`参数，该参数直接拼接到内部请求的REQUEST_URI中。攻击者可以通过构造特殊的路径参数访问内部API端点，导致服务器端请求伪造(SSRF)攻击。该漏洞对应CVE-2022-24871，允许攻击者滥用Admin SDK功能访问内部服务。

Impact: 攻击者可以通过路径遍历访问内部API端点，可能导致：1. 敏感信息泄露（用户数据、配置信息）。2. 内部服务探测。3. 权限提升（如果内部端点有更高权限）。4. 服务器端请求伪造（SSRF）攻击内部网络服务。对应CVE-2022-24871，Shopware 6 Admin SDK漏洞。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: * @Route("/api/_proxy/store-api/{salesChannelId}/{_path}", name="api.proxy.store-api", requirements={"_path" = ".*"})
污点在此传播/转换: public function proxy(string $_path, string $salesChannelId, Request $request, Context $context): Response
Nodes.code: public function proxy(string $_path, string $salesChannelId, Request $request, Context $context): Response

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: $salesChannelApiRequest = $this->setUpSalesChannelApiRequest($_path, $salesChannelId, $request, $salesChannel);
危险操作在此触发: $server = array_merge($request->server->all(), ['REQUEST_URI' => '/store-api/' . $path]);

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 读取了src/Core/Framework/Api/Controller/SalesChannelProxyController.php文件，确认proxy()方法存在。2. 分析了setUpSalesChannelApiRequest()方法，发现用户控制的$path参数直接拼接到REQUEST_URI服务器变量中。3. 编写了Python Fuzzing Harness模拟漏洞逻辑，测试了多种payload（包括路径遍历序列../、URL编码、绝对路径等）。4. 确认攻击者可以通过构造_path参数（如'../api/v1/users'）访问内部API端点。5. 路由注解requirements={"_path" = ".*"}允许任何字符，没有过滤机制。

issues.title: SSRF via youtube-dl when stream configuration is enabled
issues.description: Multiple controller endpoints (FrontController, DownloadController, JsonController) pass user-controlled URL parameters directly to youtube-dl's getVideo method without proper validation. When the stream configuration option is enabled, youtube-dl's generic extractor can be abused to perform Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) attacks, allowing requests to internal network resources. This vulnerability corresponds to CVE-2022-24739 and is mitigated when stream option is disabled (default).

issues.title: Xss in RecoveryService.php
issues.description:
User-submitted content (first name, middle name, last name, username) is used without proper HTML encoding in password recovery emails. The receiverName variable, constructed from user-controlled database fields, is passed to Symfony Mime Address constructor as display name.

Impact: 中等风险。如果邮件客户端未正确编码邮件头显示名称，可能导致：1. 邮件头注入：攻击者可注入额外的邮件头（如BCC、Subject）。2. 潜在的XSS：如果邮件客户端以HTML渲染显示名称，可能执行JavaScript。实际影响取决于邮件客户端的安全实现。

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 读取并分析了 RecoveryService.php 文件，确认 getReceiverName 方法存在且拼接用户控制的字段。2. 编写了 Fuzzing Harness 测试脚本，模拟恶意用户输入（包含 XSS payload 和换行符）。3. 测试显示如果用户输入包含换行符，receiverName 可能包含换行符，导致潜在的邮件头注入。4. 确认代码中没有对用户输入进行过滤（只有 trim 操作）。5. Symfony Mime Address 类应该会对显示名称进行编码，但需要验证是否过滤换行符。

issues.title: Path Traversal in SshResourceForm.php
issues.description:
The beforeAdd method in SshResourceForm.php constructs file paths using user-controlled $user variable without proper validation. An authenticated attacker can use directory traversal sequences (e.g., '../../') in the user field to write SSH key files to arbitrary locations.

Impact: High impact - Arbitrary file write vulnerability. Authenticated attackers can: 1. Overwrite critical system files 2. Create backdoors in web directories 3. Add SSH authorized_keys for unauthorized access 4. Write to cron directories for persistence 5. Potentially achieve remote code execution depending on file location and server configuration.

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: $user = $form->getElement('user')->getValue();
污点在此传播/转换: $filePath = $configDir . '/ssh/' . $user;
危险操作在此触发: $file = File::create($filePath, 0600);
危险操作在此触发: $file->fwrite($form->getElement('private_key')->getValue());

issues.ai_explanation: 1. Read the target file and confirmed code structure matches discovery. 2. Extracted beforeAdd function using extract_function tool. 3. Created PHP Fuzzing Harness with mock classes to simulate the vulnerable code path. 4. Tested 8 different payloads including '../', encoded variants, and deep traversal sequences. 5. All traversal payloads successfully demonstrated that files could be created outside the intended /ssh/ directory. 6. No validation or filtering found for $user variable in the code. 7. The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers to write SSH key files to arbitrary filesystem locations.

issues.title: Open Redirect in requiresAuth.js
issues.description:
在 express-openid-connect 库中，当 requiresAuth 中间件用于 catch-all 路由或使用默认 authRequired 选项时，存在开放重定向漏洞。攻击者可以构造恶意 URL，诱使用户在认证后重定向到任意外部域名。漏洞根源在于 login 方法使用 req.originalUrl 作为默认的 returnTo 值，而该值未经过充分的验证和净化。

Impact: 攻击者可以利用此漏洞进行钓鱼攻击，诱骗用户在认证后被重定向到恶意网站，可能导致凭证窃取、恶意软件分发或 CSRF 攻击放大。

Nodes.Desc: 危险操作在此触发: (req, res) => res.redirect(req.openidState.returnTo || config.baseURL),

issues.ai_explanation: 通过分析源代码，确认了完整的漏洞链：1) requiresAuth 中间件调用 res.oidc.login()；2) login() 方法使用未经验证的 req.originalUrl 作为 returnTo 值；3) returnTo 值被存储到 state 参数中；4) 认证成功后直接重定向到该值。项目版本为 2.7.1，在 CVE-2022-24794 的受影响范围内（< 2.7.2）。

issues.title: Path Traversal in StaticController.php
issues.description:
StaticController.php 中的 handle() 方法可能存在路径遍历漏洞。$assetPath 从用户请求的 URI 中提取，经过简单处理后与库的静态资源路径拼接。虽然代码通过检查库名来限制访问范围，但未对 $assetPath 中的目录遍历序列（如 ../）进行过滤。注释明确说明不使用 realpath()，且仅依赖 is_readable() 和 is_file() 检查，这些检查可能被符号链接或特殊文件绕过。

Impact: 高危漏洞。攻击者可以读取服务器上的任意文件，包括：
1. 系统敏感文件：/etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, /etc/hosts
2. 应用程序配置文件：数据库凭证、API密钥
3. 源代码文件：可能导致其他漏洞发现
4. 日志文件：可能包含敏感信息
实际影响取决于服务器文件权限和部署环境。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: $assetPath = ltrim(substr($request->getRequestUri(), strlen($request->getBaseUrl()) + 4), '/');

污点在此传播/转换: if (substr($assetPath, 0, strlen($candidate->getName())) === $candidate->getName()) {
                $library = $candid

危险操作在此触发: $filePath = $assetRoot . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $assetPath;

        // Doesn't use realpath as it isn't supposed to acce

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 读取了library/Icinga/Web/Controller/StaticController.php文件，确认文件存在且代码与描述一致。
2. 分析了handle()方法的完整逻辑：
   - 第23行：从请求URI提取$assetPath，未过滤目录遍历序列
   - 第27-30行：匹配库名，提取剩余路径
   - 第42行：拼接完整文件路径：$assetRoot . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $assetPath
   - 第44-45行：检查is_readable()和is_file()，但注释明确说明'不使用realpath'
3. 确认漏洞存在：攻击者可以构造如'/icingaweb2/lib/icinga/../../../../etc/passwd'的请求URI，通过../序列遍历到asset/static目录之外。
4. 验证了多种绕过方式：URL编码(..%2f)、Windows风格(..\)、空字节(\0)等。

issues.title: Unknown in URI.js
issues.description:
URI.parse() function does not trim leading whitespace before parsing URL. The regex at line 516 uses ^ anchor which requires protocol at string start, not after whitespace. This could cause incorrect parsing of URLs like ' http://example.com'.

Impact: URLs with leading whitespace are incorrectly parsed, potentially bypassing protocol validation or whitelisting. This could allow attackers to submit malicious URLs that evade security checks or cause incorrect URL resolution.

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: string = string.replace(/^(https?|ftp|wss?)?:[/\\]*/i, '$1://');

issues.ai_explanation: Created a test harness that simulates the URI.parse() function logic. Tested URLs with leading whitespace (spaces, tabs, newlines) and confirmed that the regex at line 516 with ^ anchor fails to match when whitespace precedes the protocol. This causes URLs like ' http://example.com' to have protocol=None instead of protocol='http', matching CVE-2022-24723 description.

issues.title: Path Traversal in file.go
issues.description:
The UnZip function in fileutil/file.go is vulnerable to path traversal (Zip Slip) attacks. The function uses filepath.Join(destPath, f.Name) to construct extraction paths without validating or sanitizing f.Name, which could contain path traversal sequences like '../../etc/passwd'.

Impact: 任意文件写入漏洞，可导致：1. 覆盖系统关键文件（如 /etc/passwd、/etc/shadow）造成拒绝服务或权限提升；2. 写入 webshell 实现远程代码执行；3. 写入 SSH 公钥实现未授权访问；4. 破坏应用程序完整性。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: for _, f := range zipReader.File {
污点在此传播/转换: path := filepath.Join(destPath, f.Name)
危险操作在此触发: outFile, err := os.OpenFile(path, os.O_WRONLY|os.O_CREATE|os.O_TRUNC, f.Mode())

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 读取 fileutil/file.go 文件，确认 UnZip 函数确实使用 filepath.Join(destPath, f.Name) 构造路径。2. 编写 Python Fuzzing Harness 模拟 filepath.Join 行为，演示当 f.Name 包含路径遍历序列（如 '../../etc/passwd'）时，构造的路径会逃逸出目标目录。3. 分析代码逻辑：构造的路径直接用于 os.OpenFile 和 os.MkdirAll，没有进行任何验证或清理。4. 这是经典的 Zip Slip 漏洞模式（CVE-2018-1002202）。

issues.title: Velocity Sandbox Bypass via Class Method Allowlist Leading to Path Traversal
issues.description: The SecureIntrospector class in XWiki Commons Velocity component contains a sandbox bypass vulnerability (CVE-2022-24897). The checkObjectExecutePermission method allows execution of certain Class methods (getName, getSimpleName, getEnumConstants, etc.) on Class objects. Attackers can exploit these allowed methods in Velocity templates to obtain sensitive class information, potentially bypassing security restrictions and gaining access to file system operations. This could lead to path traversal attacks where attackers can read, list, or manipulate files on the server filesystem.

issues.title: DHIS2 DocumentController SSRF漏洞 (CVE-2022-41949)

issues.title: Open Redirect in auth.html
issues.description:
在 auth.html 文件中，JavaScript 代码从 URL 参数中提取 'redirect' 参数，使用 decodeURIComponent() 解码后直接设置 window.location.href，没有进行任何验证。攻击者可以构造恶意 URL，将用户重定向到任意网站，用于钓鱼攻击或恶意软件分发。这与 CVE-2022-41965 描述的 Opencast 认证开放重定向漏洞一致。

Impact: 攻击者可以利用此漏洞进行钓鱼攻击，诱骗用户输入敏感信息（如登录凭证）。如果重定向到 javascript: 协议，可能导致 XSS 攻击，窃取用户会话 cookie。还可能用于恶意软件分发或跳转到恶意网站。由于这是认证页面，用户可能更容易信任此类重定向。

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: var redirect = search['redirect'];

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 使用 read_file 读取并分析了 auth.html 文件的完整代码。2. 使用 search_code 确认了漏洞代码位置。3. 使用 dataflow_analysis 确认了数据流从 window.location.search 到 window.location.href。4. 代码分析显示：redirect 参数从 URL 提取，使用 decodeURIComponent() 解码后直接赋值给 window.location.href，没有任何验证、白名单检查或协议限制。5. 可以构造多种恶意 payload：外部 URL、javascript: 协议、data: 协议等。

issues.title: Xss in drag_and_drop_v2.py
issues.description:
The `index_dictionary` method in `drag_and_drop_v2/drag_and_drop_v2.py` does not apply the `_clean_data` function to the `display_name` and `background_image_description` (from `targetImgDescription`) fields, while all other user-input fields are properly sanitized.

Impact: Attackers can inject malicious JavaScript that executes when the indexed content is rendered. This could affect: 1. Search results pages displaying course content 2. Administrative interfaces showing indexed data 3. Any system that consumes the index_dictionary output without additional sanitization. The vulnerability allows for cross-site scripting attacks that could lead to session hijacking, defacement, or other client-side attacks.

Other fields (question_text, zone titles, descriptions, item display names) all use _clean_data function. 3. _clean_data function uses Cleaner(tags=[], strip=True) to remove all HTML tags. 4. Test confirmed malicious scripts are preserved in display_name and background_image_description fields while being removed from other fields by _clean_data.

issues.title: Code Injection in DingTalkNotifier.java
issues.description:
多个Notifier组件使用StandardEvaluationContext解析SpEL表达式，攻击者可以通过环境变量注入恶意SpEL表达式，导致任意代码执行。受影响版本：Spring Boot Admin 2.6.x < 2.6.10, 2.7.x < 2.7.8。攻击者需要具有UI写权限来修改环境变量。CVSS评分：3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H。

Impact: 攻击者可通过注入恶意SpEL表达式实现任意代码执行，完全控制服务器。可导致：1. 敏感信息泄露（读取文件、环境变量、系统属性）2. 系统破坏（删除文件、停止服务）3. 横向移动（访问内网资源）4. 持久化后门。CVSS评分3.1反映需要UI交互和写权限，但一旦利用成功影响严重。

issues.title: Path Traversal in StartupFilter.java
issues.description:
在StartupFilter.doFilter()方法中，当请求路径以'/images'或'/initfilter/scripts'开头时，代码直接使用用户控制的httpRequest.getPathInfo()构造文件路径，未进行路径规范化检查。攻击者可以通过构造包含'../'序列的pathInfo参数，访问Web应用目录外的敏感文件，如配置文件、系统文件等。漏洞位于第118-130行，特别是第123行将未经验证的pathInfo直接用于文件路径构造。

Impact: 攻击者可以读取服务器上的任意文件，包括：1. 系统敏感文件（/etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, /etc/hosts）。2. 应用程序配置文件（WEB-INF/web.xml, database.properties）。3. 源代码文件。4. SSH密钥和证书。5. 日志文件包含敏感信息。这可能导致系统完全沦陷，包括获取数据库凭证、执行权限提升等。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: if (httpRequest.getPathInfo() != null) {
污点在此传播/转换: file = new File(file, httpRequest.getPathInfo());
危险操作在此触发: imageFileInputStream = new FileInputStream(file);

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 读取并分析了 StartupFilter.doFilter() 方法的完整代码（第118-130行）。2. 确认 httpRequest.getPathInfo() 是用户可控输入，直接传递给 new File(file, pathInfo) 而没有验证。3. 编写了 Python Fuzzing Harness 模拟漏洞逻辑，测试了多种路径遍历 payload（../, ../../, ../../../etc/passwd 等）。4. 测试证实使用 '../../../etc/passwd' 作为 pathInfo 可以成功逃逸出基础目录，访问系统文件。5. 搜索了整个文件，未发现任何路径规范化或安全检查代码。6. 漏洞模式与已知的 CVE-2022-23612 描述完全匹配。

issues.title: Unknown in registerLoginReset.vue
issues.description:
sanitizeRedirect function uses DOMPurify.sanitize(redirect) which is designed for HTML sanitization, not URL validation. It may allow protocol-relative URLs (e.g., //evil.com) leading to open redirect when assigned to window.location.href.

Impact: 开放重定向漏洞，攻击者可诱导用户访问恶意网站，用于网络钓鱼、恶意软件分发或会话窃取

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: const redirectTo = this.sanitizeRedirect(this.$route.query.redirectTo);
危险操作在此触发: window.location.href = redirectTo;

issues.ai_explanation: 通过read_file确认sanitizeRedirect函数实现。函数使用DOMPurify.sanitize进行HTML净化，但DOMPurify不验证URL格式。函数添加'/'前缀的逻辑无法阻止协议相对URL(//evil.com)，因为添加'/'后变成///evil.com，仍然是协议相对URL。redirectTo参数来自this.$route.query.redirectTo，是用户可控的URL查询参数。最终赋值给window.location.href，导致开放重定向。

issues.description: The MyFormAuthenticator.java file contains an open redirect vulnerability in the showLogin method. The xredirect parameter is constructed from user-controlled request data (request.getRequestURI() and request.getQueryString()), URL encoded, and then used in a redirect without validation of the target URL. This allows attackers to craft malicious URLs that redirect users to arbitrary external sites after login.

issues.ai_explanation: 通过分析代码逻辑，确认当配置 enable_formmanager_content_check 设置为 false 时，用户提供的 TWIG 模板内容会被接受并渲染。RenderFormFromTwig 方法创建 Twig_Environment 时没有启用沙箱保护，可能导致 TWIG 模板注入。默认配置下是安全的（enable_formmanager_content_check = true），但配置错误会导致漏洞。

issues.title: Path Traversal in AbstractSxExportURLFactoryActionHandler
issues.description: The createURL method in AbstractSxExportURLFactoryActionHandler directly concatenates user-controlled spaceNames and name parameters to construct a file system path without proper validation or encoding. This allows an attacker to inject path traversal sequences (e.g., '../') to write files outside the intended export directory. The vulnerability exists because the targetPath construction at line 131 uses StringUtils.join(spaceNames, '/') and name without encoding, while only the URL path construction uses encodeURLPart. An attacker with VIEW permission can exploit this to write arbitrary files to the server filesystem.

issues.title: Xss in prism-command-line.js
issues.description:
Prism command line 插件在将输出行插入到 DOM 时没有进行 HTML 转义。攻击者可以通过控制代码输入中由 data-output 或 data-filter-output 属性指定的行来注入恶意脚本，当页面使用该插件渲染代码时，脚本会被执行。存在两个漏洞点：1) 在 before-insert hook 中直接将 outputLines 拼接到 HTML 字符串；2) 在 complete hook 中使用 innerHTML

Impact: 远程代码执行。攻击者可以在受害者浏览器中执行任意JavaScript代码，可能导致会话劫持、敏感信息窃取、页面篡改等。
issues.ai_explanation:
1. 读取了plugins/command-line/prism-command-line.js文件的完整内容。
2. 分析了before-highlight hook（第53-131行）：用户通过data-output或data-filter-output属性指定输出行，这些行的内容来自用户输入的代码（env.code）。
3. 分析了before-insert hook（第133-154行）：outputLines数组中的内容被直接拼接到HTML字符串中，没有进行HTML转义。
4. 分析了complete hook（第156-224行）：getAttribute函数只转义双引号，没有转义其他HTML特殊字符；promptLines通过字符串拼接构建，然后通过innerHTML赋值。
5. 使用pattern_match工具检测到了innerHTML赋值漏洞（第209行）。
6. 使用search_code工具确认了只有双引号被转义。
7. 由于run_code工具失败，无法进行动态验证，但静态分析足够明确。

issues.title: Ssrf in RSSFeed.php
issues.description:
The prepareInputForAdd method in src/RSSFeed.php accepts user-controlled URL input via $input['url'] and passes it to getRSSFeed function without proper validation. getRSSFeed passes the URL to SimplePie's set_feed_url method which then makes HTTP requests, leading to Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF).

Impact: 攻击者可以利用此漏洞：
1. 探测内部网络服务，发现内部基础设施
2. 攻击内部脆弱的Web应用程序
3. 访问云元数据服务（如AWS、Azure、GCP的metadata API），获取敏感凭证
4. 进行端口扫描，识别内部开放的服务端口
5. 如果SimplePie支持file://协议，可能读取本地文件

这是一个Blind SSRF，响应不会直接返回给用户，但攻击者可以通过其他方式推断请求结果（如错误信息、响应时间等）。
issues.ai_explanation:
1. 读取并分析了src/RSSFeed.php文件，确认prepareInputForAdd方法在第613行调用getRSSFeed($input['url'])。
2. 读取并分析了getRSSFeed函数，确认它在第927行调用$feed->set_feed_url($url)并在第932行调用$feed->init()。
3. 读取并分析了front/rssfeed.form.php文件，确认用户可以通过POST请求添加RSS feed，URL参数来自$_POST。
4. 确认没有任何URL验证或过滤机制。getRSSFeed函数只有HTML编码/解码处理（第906-908行），没有检查URL是否指向内部服务。
5. SimplePie库会尝试获取任何提供的URL，这允许攻击者指定内部URL进行SSRF攻击。

issues.title: Path Traversal in validator.py
issues.description:
The validate_url function in validator.py incorrectly checks if a web URL exists as a local file path using os.path.exists(). When a user provides a web URL (e.g., http://example.com) and a local file with the same name exists, or when a user provides a path traversal payload (e.g., ../../etc/passwd), the function will open and read the local file, leading to unauthorized file read.

Impact: Information disclosure - attacker can read arbitrary files from the filesystem including sensitive files like /etc/passwd, configuration files, source code, or any file accessible to the application user. The vulnerability requires the file to exist and contain at least one line with a valid MangaDex URL (or file is read even if validation fails).

Nodes.Desc:
用户可控数据在此进入: def validate(parser, args):
    urls = args.URL

污点在此传播/转换: # Parsing file path
        if args.file:
            result = urls.split(':')
            file = result[1:]

危险操作在此触发: def validate_url(url):
    if os.path.exists(url):
        with open(url, 'r') as opener:
            content = opener.r

issues.ai_explanation: Created a Python Fuzzing Harness that mocks os.path.exists and open functions to track when they are called. Tested with various payloads including path traversal (../../etc/passwd), web URL path confusion (http://example.com), and absolute paths (/etc/passwd). The harness confirmed that validate_url function calls os.path.exists() on user input, and if returns True, opens the file with open(). This allows reading arbitrary files from the filesystem. Even when file content doesn't contain valid MangaDex URLs (causing validation error), the file is already read, confirming information disclosure vulnerability.

issues.title: Command Injection in BrowserLauncherImpl.java
issues.description:
A command injection vulnerability exists in BrowserLauncherImpl when launching browsers on Windows. The openURL method receives user-controlled URL input which is passed to launchBrowser method. On Windows systems, the URL is concatenated directly into a command string executed via Runtime.exec(), allowing command injection through special characters like &, |, etc.

Impact: Remote code execution on Windows systems. An attacker could execute arbitrary commands with the privileges of the application user. This could lead to complete system compromise if the application runs with elevated privileges.

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: public void openURL(final String url)

issues.ai_explanation:
1. Read the complete BrowserLauncherImpl.java file and identified the vulnerable code path.
2. The launchBrowser method on Windows uses Runtime.exec() with string concatenation: "rundll32 url.dll,FileProtocolHandler " + url.
3. Created a Java Fuzzing Harness to simulate the execution and test various payloads.
4. Tested payloads with &, |, &&, || characters which are command separators in Windows.
5. Confirmed that these characters would cause command injection when the command is executed via cmd.exe.
6. The vulnerability is exploitable if the application processes user-controlled URLs.

issues.title: Open Redirect in proxy.py
issues.description:
The application uses the X-Forwarded-Host HTTP header to set the request.base value without proper validation. An attacker can set a malicious X-Forwarded-Host header containing a domain they control. When the application performs redirects using request.base, users may be redirected to the attacker's domain.

issues.title: Path Traversal in ZipUtil.java

Impact: 高危。攻击者可以通过上传恶意 ZIP 文件实现：1) 任意文件写入，可能覆盖系统关键文件；2) 敏感信息泄露（如写入到 /etc/passwd 位置）；3) 在系统目录中创建恶意脚本，可能导致远程代码执行。该漏洞在导入导出功能和系统更新功能中被使用，攻击面较大。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: String fileName = zipEntry.getName();
污点在此传播/转换: file = new File(destDir, fileName);
危险操作在此触发: FileOutputStream fileOutputStream = new FileOutputStream(file);

issues.ai_explanation: 通过 read_file 确认了 modules/common/app/utils/common/ZipUtil.java 文件存在且包含报告的漏洞代码。分析了 unzip 方法（第36-70行），确认它直接使用 zipEntry.getName() 而不进行路径遍历验证。检查了 IOUtils.checkFilename 方法，发现它包含路径分隔符检查（/ 和 \），但 ZipUtil.unzip 未调用此方法。通过 search_code 确认了 ZipUtil 在 ImportExportService.java 和 JatosUpdater.java 等关键组件中被使用，增加了漏洞的严重性。

issues.title: Path Traversal in nodes.py
issues.description:
The function `extract_dents` in `ubireader/ubifs/output.py` uses `os.path.join(path, dent_node.name)` to construct file paths without validating `dent_node.name`. Since `dent_node.name` is extracted from user-controlled UBIFS image data, an attacker can craft a malicious UBIFS image with filenames containing path traversal sequences (e.g., '../../etc/passwd') to write arbitrary files outside the intended extraction directory.

Impact: 攻击者可以创建恶意的 UBIFS 镜像，当使用 ubireader_extract_files 提取时，可以将文件写入任意位置，包括系统关键文件（如 /etc/passwd、/etc/shadow、/root/.ssh/authorized_keys），导致任意文件写入、权限提升或系统完全破坏。

    $qte = (int)GETPOST('
Nodes.code:
$price = price2num(GETPOST('price','int') );                   // prix entré par l'utilisateur
    $qte = (int)GETPOST('qty','int');                         // quantité demandée
    $unitprice = ($qte > 1) ? $price/$qte : $price;     // prix unitaire

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 读取并分析了script/interface.php文件中的相关代码；2. 分析了GETPOST函数的使用：$id_prod使用(int)GETPOST('idprod','int')双重整数转换，$price使用price2num(GETPOST('price','int'))数值转换；3. 基于Dolibarr框架的典型实现，'int'过滤器会将输入转换为整数，例如'1 OR 1=1'会被转换为整数1；4. price2num函数通常将字符串转换为浮点数；5. 即使攻击者输入SQL注入payload，经过数值转换后只会得到数字值，无法注入SQL代码；6. 虽然代码使用了字符串拼接而非参数化查询，但输入经过严格的数值转换，实际不存在SQL注入漏洞。

issues.title: Path Traversal via Symbolic Link in LocalFilesystemConnector.getItem()
issues.description: The getItem method in LocalFilesystemConnector.java does not properly validate symbolic link targets, allowing path traversal when followlinks is set to EXTERNAL (default). An attacker can create a symbolic link within the localPath directory pointing to sensitive files outside the restricted directory. When getItem processes the symbolic link, it resolves the canonical path and, if followlinks is EXTERNAL and the target is outside localPath, it will follow the link and return metadata (size, timestamps, permissions) of the target file, leading to information disclosure.

issues.title: Sql Injection in LoadUsers.php
issues.description:
The $sort parameter from POST request is directly interpolated into SQL ORDER BY clause without validation or sanitization in the _Load_Users function. This allows attackers to manipulate the SQL query by injecting malicious SQL code.

Impact: Attackers can inject arbitrary SQL code into ORDER BY clause, potentially leading to: 1) Data extraction via UNION-based injection or subqueries, 2) Database manipulation (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP), 3) Denial of service via heavy queries or SLEEP() functions, 4) Potential privilege escalation if database user has high privileges, 5) Bypass of application logic.

issues.title: Inconsistent Session Cookie Secure Flag Configuration (CVE-2022-4606)
issues.description: The application has inconsistent session cookie secure flag configuration. In defaults.php line 123, `ini_set('session.cookie_secure', 1);` is always set regardless of HTTPS availability. However, COOKIE_SECURE constant is defined as true in core.cookie.php. The issue reported in CVE-2022-4606 indicates that session cookies may miss the secure flag in certain configurations, potentially allowing session cookies to be transmitted over unencrypted HTTP connections.

issues.title: Sql Injection in api.php
issues.description:
The getHistory function in api.php directly concatenates user-controlled parameters ($symbol, $startDate, $endDate) into SQL query. Although validation functions (isValidSymbol, areValidDates) provide basic input checking

Impact: 在默认配置和当前验证函数下，实际可利用的 SQL 注入风险较低。但如果验证被绕过、修改或配置不当，可能导致完整的 SQL 注入攻击，包括数据泄露、数据篡改或数据库破坏。此外，直接使用用户输入作为表名可能导致访问未授权表。
issues.ai_explanation: 读取了 api.php 和 validation.php 文件，分析了数据流：用户输入从 $_GET 获取，经过验证函数检查后，直接拼接到 SQL 查询中。验证函数 isValidSymbol 使用 ctype_alpha 确保只包含字母且长度≤8，isValidDate 使用 ctype_digit 确保只包含数字且长度≤8。在默认配置下，这些验证限制了 SQL 注入的可能性，但直接拼接用户输入到 SQL 查询中仍然是不安全的设计模式。

issues.title: Unknown in resource.go
issues.description:
The /resource/:resourceId/blob endpoint sets Content-Type header directly from resource.Type, which is user-controlled via file upload. If an attacker uploads an HTML file with a non-HTML Content-Type (e.g., image/png), the browser may still interpret it as HTML due to MIME sniffing, leading to XSS.

Impact: 存储型XSS攻击。攻击者可上传恶意HTML文件，当其他用户访问该资源时，浏览器可能执行任意JavaScript代码，导致会话劫持、数据窃取等后果。

issues.ai_explanation: 通过读取server/resource.go文件，确认：1. 第46行从用户上传文件获取Content-Type头；2. 第61行将其存储到resource.Type；3. 第161行直接使用resource.Type设置HTTP响应头。攻击者可上传HTML文件但声明为image/png等非HTML类型，浏览器可能通过MIME嗅探将其解释为HTML并执行XSS攻击。

issues.title: Ssrf in smokescreen.go
issues.description:
Smokescreen HTTP 代理存在 SSRF 漏洞，攻击者可以通过在主机名周围添加方括号（如 [example.com]）来绕过 deny list 检查。漏洞位于主机名解析和匹配逻辑中：1) hostExtractRE 正则表达式（^([^:]*)(:\d+)?$）从主机名中提取目的地时，不会去除方括号；2) hostMatchesGlob 函数在比较主机名和 deny list 规则时，只进行小写转换和去除尾部点号，但不会去除方括号

Impact: 攻击者可以绕过 Smokescreen 的 deny list 检查，访问内部网络资源，导致服务器端请求伪造（SSRF）。这可能允许攻击者扫描内部网络、访问内部服务或与云元数据服务交互。

Nodes.Desc: 污点在此传播/转换: sctx.decision, sctx.lookupTime, pctx.Error = checkIfRequestShouldBeProxied(config, req, remoteHost)
Nodes.code: sctx.decision, sctx.lookupTime, pctx.Error = checkIfRequestShouldBeProxied(config, req, remoteHost)

Nodes.Desc:
污点在此传播/转换: submatch := hostExtractRE.FindStringSubmatch(outboundHost)
	destination := submatch[1]
污点在此传播/转换: const hostExtractPattern = "^([^:]*)(:\\d+)?$"

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 验证文件 pkg/smokescreen/smokescreen.go 存在且包含漏洞代码
2. 分析 hostExtractRE 正则表达式（constants.go:33）：模式 ^([^:]*)(:\d+)?$ 匹配主机名和端口，但不会去除方括号
3. 分析 hostMatchesGlob 函数（acl.go:232-249）：只进行小写转换和去除尾部点号，不会去除方括号
4. 追踪数据流：req.Host -> remoteHost -> outboundHost -> destination -> hostMatchesGlob 比较
5. 确认逻辑漏洞：如果 deny list 包含 'example.com'，攻击者发送 '[example.com]' 时，hostExtractRE 提取出 '[example.com]'，hostMatchesGlob 比较 '[example.com]' 和 'example.com' 返回 false，从而绕过检查

issues.title: Reflected XSS in Flamingo Theme UI newThemeName Parameter
issues.description: The FlamingoThemesCode.WebHomeSheet.xml file contains a reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the newThemeName hidden input field at line 290. The value attribute directly outputs user-controlled input ($request.newThemeName) without proper escaping using Velocity's escapetool. An attacker can craft a malicious URL with a newThemeName parameter containing JavaScript payloads (e.g., '" onmouseover=alert(1) x="'), which will be executed in the victim's browser when the page is loaded. This vulnerability is confirmed by CVE-2022-29251 and affects XWiki Platform versions before 12.10.11, 13.4.7, 13.10.3, and 14.0-rc-1.

issues.title: Xss in SaveOptionApiController.php
issues.description:
在SaveOptionApiController.php的saveOption方法中，实现了有条件的XSS清理机制。当option_key为'website_head'或'website_footer'时，会完全绕过XSS清理（$cleanFromXss = false）。这种设计虽然可能是为了支持这些字段需要包含HTML内容的功能需求，但也引入了安全风险。根据CVE-2022-0954的历史漏洞，类似的绕过机制曾导致存储型XSS漏洞。

Impact: 存储型跨站脚本攻击（Stored XSS）。攻击者可以注入恶意JavaScript代码，这些代码将在所有访问网站的用户浏览器中执行。可能导致：
1. 窃取用户会话cookie，导致账户劫持
2. 重定向用户到恶意网站
3. 修改页面内容进行钓鱼攻击
4. 执行任意操作（如果用户是管理员）
5. 传播恶意软件
影响范围：所有访问网站的用户。

2. 读取HTMLClean.php确认清理能力：使用AntiXSS和HTMLPurifier进行严格清理。
3. 读取options.php了解save_option函数存储数据。
4. 读取FrontendController.php确认渲染逻辑：website_head和website_footer的值被直接插入到HTML中（第1212-1215行和第1133-1135行），没有进行HTML转义。
5. 搜索代码确认website_head和website_footer的使用场景。
6. 完整的攻击链：攻击者通过SaveOptionApiController设置website_head/website_footer值->绕过XSS清理->存储到数据库->FrontendController读取并直接插入到HTML->导致存储型XSS。

issues.title: Xss in Security.php
issues.description:
在system/src/Grav/Common/Security.php的detectXss函数中，第217行的invalid_protocols正则表达式'(:|\&\#58)'可能无法正确检测所有HTML实体编码的冒号变体（如:、:等）。攻击者可以通过构造特殊的HTML实体编码来绕过协议检测，从而注入恶意脚本。这是一个存储型XSS漏洞，低权限用户（有创建/更新页面权限）可以利用。

Impact: 低。基于代码分析，各种HTML实体编码的冒号在正则匹配前已被解码，因此绕过可能性很低。

Nodes.Desc: 危险操作在此触发: 'invalid_protocols' => '#(' . implode('|', array_map('preg_quote', $invalid_protocols, ['#'])) . ')(:|\&\#58)\S.*?#iUu',

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 验证了文件system/src/Grav/Common/Security.php存在且包含detectXss函数。
2. 分析了函数逻辑：在应用invalid_protocols正则表达式匹配之前，函数进行了多层解码：URL解码、十六进制实体解码（处理:等）、HTML实体解码（使用ENT_HTML5标志，处理:、:、:等）。
3. 正则表达式'(:|\&\#58)'匹配普通冒号或HTML实体:，但处理后的字符串中各种HTML实体编码的冒号应该已被解码为普通冒号。
4. 函数同时匹配处理后的字符串($string)和原始字符串($orig)，即使实体在原始字符串中，处理后的字符串也会包含解码后的冒号。
5. 由于无法动态测试PHP代码（环境不可用），基于静态分析判断漏洞很可能不存在。

issues.title: Sql Injection in AdminUserController.class.php
issues.description:
在AdminUserController.class.php的getList()方法中，用户输入的username参数通过SQLite3::escapeString()进行转义后直接拼接到SQL查询的LIKE子句中。SQLite3::escapeString()仅转义单引号，不能防止LIKE子句中的SQL注入攻击（如使用%和_通配符）。攻击者可以构造特殊的username参数绕过转义，执行SQL注入攻击。

Impact: 攻击者可以利用通配符%或_改变LIKE子句的匹配行为，可能导致信息泄露（例如获取所有用户记录）。但无法执行任意SQL代码，无法进行数据篡改、删除或绕过认证。实际影响中等，属于业务逻辑漏洞。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: $username = I("username");
污点在此传播/转换: $username = \SQLite3::escapeString($username);
危险操作在此触发: $where .= " and username like '%{$username}%' ";

issues.ai_explanation: 验证过程：1. 读取目标文件确认代码存在。2. 分析SQLite3::escapeString()函数：该函数仅转义单引号（将'替换为''），不转义LIKE通配符%和_。3. 检查SQL查询构建：转义后的用户名直接拼接到LIKE子句中，形成'%{username}%'模式。4. 安全评估：由于单引号被正确转义，攻击者无法提前结束字符串字面量，因此无法注入额外的SQL语句（如UNION SELECT）。然而，通配符%和_会保留特殊含义，攻击者可以利用它们改变LIKE匹配行为（例如使用%匹配所有记录），但这属于业务逻辑漏洞而非SQL注入。5. 使用search_code发现项目中有8处类似模式，表明这是通用做法。6. pattern_match工具未检测到SQL注入模式。结论：该漏洞不是真正的SQL注入，而是通配符注入导致的信息泄露风险，应归类为业务逻辑漏洞。

issues.title: Open Redirect in http.js
issues.description:
The parseUrl function in lib/util.js uses a flawed regular expression /^(https?):\/\/([^:&^\/]*):?(\d*)(.*)$/g that cannot properly handle URLs containing @ symbols. For example, http://example.com@evil.com will be parse

Impact: 1. Open Redirect: 如果应用程序基于解析出的主机名进行重定向决策，攻击者可构造恶意 URL 进行重定向攻击。2. 连接错误: socket 连接会尝试连接到 'example.com@evil.com' 这个无效的主机名。3. 证书验证绕过: 如果使用解析出的 host 进行 SSL 证书验证，可能导致验证绕过。

issues.ai_explanation: 1. 确认 lib/http.js 第444行调用了 http.parseUrl(options.url)。2. 确认 lib/util.js 第2268-2296行定义了 parseUrl 函数，使用有缺陷的正则表达式 /^(https?):\/\/([^:&^\/]*):?(\d*)(.*)$/g。3. 正则表达式分析显示第2组 ([^:&^\/]*) 匹配除了 :, &, ^, / 之外的字符，包括 @ 符号。4. 这意味着 URL http://example.com@evil.com 会被错误解析：host 字段为 'example.com@evil.com'（应该是 'evil.com'）。5. 解析出的 host 在 lib/http.js 第124行被用于 socket 连接，可能导致 open redirect 或连接错误。

issues.title: DOM XSS via DOMParser.parseFromString() in Karma test runner (CVE-2022-0437)
issues.description: The vulnerability exists in the loadScript function in client/karma.js where HTML strings from window.__karma__.scriptUrls are parsed using DOMParser.parseFromString() without proper sanitization. An attacker can inject malicious HTML/JavaScript into the scriptUrls array, leading to arbitrary JavaScript execution in the context of the Karma test runner page. This is CVE-2022-0437, fixed in Karma 6.3.14.

issues.title: Sql Injection in list.php
issues.description:
The file htdocs/compta/sociales/list.php contains a SQL injection vulnerability related to CVE-2022-0224. User-controlled input from the search_users parameter is directly concatenated into an SQL IN clause without proper sanitization.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过 SQL 注入读取、修改或删除数据库中的数据。可能获取敏感信息、提升权限或破坏数据完整性。

Nodes.Desc: 用户可控数据在此进入: $search_users = GETPOST('search_users');

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 读取文件 htdocs/compta/sociales/list.php，确认第58行和第208-210行代码存在。
2. 分析 GETPOST 函数在 htdocs/core/lib/functions.lib.php 中的实现，发现默认的 'alphanohtml' 过滤器只处理字符串，不处理数组（checkVal 函数中有 if (!is_array($out)) 检查）。
3. 对比其他搜索条件：第198行使用 $db->escape($search_ref)，第201行使用 natural_search()（内部使用 $db->escape()），但第209行没有使用任何转义。
4. 确认漏洞原理：用户可以通过数组参数传入恶意值（如 search_users[]=1&search_users[]=2&search_users[]=3' OR '1'='1），这些值不会被过滤，直接拼接到 SQL 查询中。

issues.title: Stored XSS in user_box.tpl.php due to incomplete htmlspecialchars encoding (CVE-2022-0395)
issues.description: The file lhc_web/design/defaulttheme/tpl/pagelayouts/parts/user_box.tpl.php contains a stored XSS vulnerability at line 15 where user-controlled data ($UserData->name and $UserData->surname) is output using htmlspecialchars() without the ENT_QUOTES flag. While htmlspecialchars provides basic HTML entity encoding for &, ", <, and > characters, it does not encode single quotes (') by default (ENT_COMPAT mode). This creates a security gap where user data containing single quotes could potentially break out of HTML/JavaScript contexts. The vulnerability is stored because $UserData comes from the database, meaning malicious user input can be persisted and later rendered to other users.

issues.title: Xss in Validation.php
issues.description:
在Grav CMS 1.7.28之前的版本中，Security.php中的detectXss()方法存在XSS检测绕过漏洞。攻击者可以通过使用HTML实体编码（如:、"等）和空白字符操作来绕过XSS检测，提交恶意脚本。当其他用户查看包含恶意内容的页面时，脚本会在其浏览器中执行。

具体问题：
1. html_entity_decode()使用ENT_NOQUOTES标志，引号实体（"、'）不会被解码
2. 攻击者可以使用HTML实体编码的引号绕过XSS检测
3. 浏览器会解码这些实体，导致XSS执行

Impact: 攻击者可以提交包含HTML实体编码的XSS payload，绕过Grav CMS的XSS检测。当其他用户查看包含恶意内容的页面时，恶意脚本会在其浏览器中执行，可能导致会话劫持、敏感信息窃取、页面篡改等安全问题。

issues.title: Code Injection in functions.lib.php
issues.description:
The dol_eval function uses eval() to execute PHP code. While it has security filters (blocking backticks, dangerous functions like exec, and superglobals), the filtering logic may be bypassable. The function is called in multiple places with potentially user-controlled data from database fields.

Impact: 如果攻击者能够向数据库的 extrafields 字段注入恶意 PHP 代码，可能实现远程代码执行。需要管理员权限或 SQL 注入漏洞才能利用。

issues.ai_explanation:
1. 确认 dol_eval 函数存在并使用 eval() 执行 PHP 代码
2. 确认函数有安全过滤：禁止反引号、危险函数、超全局变量
3. 发现过滤可能被绕过：call_user_func_array、file_get_contents、readfile 不在黑名单中；字符串拼接可绕过函数名检测
4. 确认 dol_eval 在多个位置被调用，传入的数据可能来自数据库字段

issues.title: Code Injection in argparse.py

The parse_env_variables function in pytorch_lightning/utilities/argparse.py uses eval() on environment variable values without validation, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary Python code by setting malicious environment variables.

3. 导入危险模块
4. 访问网络资源
5. 反弹shell
影响范围取决于应用程序的运行权限。

issues.title: Xss in AttachmentModel.class.php
issues.description:
AttachmentModel.class.php中的isDangerFilename()函数检查不完整，允许上传危险文件类型（如.xhtml），导致存储型XSS漏洞。攻击者可以上传包含恶意JavaScript的.xhtml文件，当用户访问该文件时，浏览器会解析并执行其中的JavaScript代码。

Impact: 攻击者可以上传包含恶意JavaScript的.xhtml或.html文件，当其他用户访问这些文件时，JavaScript会在受害者浏览器中执行，导致：
1. 窃取用户会话cookie
2. 重定向到恶意网站
3. 执行任意操作（如果用户已登录）
4. 窃取敏感信息
5. 传播恶意软件
由于是存储型XSS，影响范围广，所有访问该文件的用户都会受影响。

issues.title: Remote Command Execution via Git Hook File Upload
issues.description: Gogs prior to 0.12.6 allows remote command execution through file upload functionality. Attackers can upload malicious scripts to the 'custom_hooks' directory, which are then executed by git hooks. The vulnerability exists because: 1) IsMaliciousPath() only checks for absolute paths and '..' sequences, allowing paths like 'custom_hooks/pre-receive'. 2) isRepositoryGitPath() only checks for '.git' paths, not 'custom_hooks' directories. 3) No validation prevents uploads to the 'custom_hooks' directory where scripts are automatically executed during git operations.

issues.title: Xss in AttachmentModel.class.php
issues.description: 在ShowDoc v2.10.4之前版本中，存在存储型跨站脚本（XSS）漏洞，攻击者可以通过上传特定类型的文件（如.csv、.txt、.xls、.xlsx、.ppt、.pptx、.psd）来注入恶意JavaScript代码。这些文件类型在AttachmentModel.class.php的扩展名白名单中被允许上传。当用户访问这些上传的文件时，根据visitFile方法的逻辑：1) 如果文件存储在OSS上或文件类型为.bmp/.jpg/.

Nodes.code:
<?php
namespace Api\Model;
use Api\Model\BaseModel;
use AsyncAws\S3\S3Client;

/**
 * 
 * @author star7th      
 */
class AttachmentModel extends BaseModel {

	Protected $autoCheckFields = false;  //一定要关闭字段缓存，不然会报找不到表的错误

	//获取某个用户的当前已使用附件流量
	public function getUserFlow($uid){
		$month = Date("Y-m") ;
		$file_flow = D("FileFlow")->where(" uid = '%s'  and date_month = '$month' " , array($uid))->find() ;
		if($file_flow){
			return intval($file_flow['used']) ;
		}else{
			D("FileFlow")->add(array(
				"uid" => $uid ,
				"used" => 0  ,
				"date_month" => $month ,

			));
			return 0 ;
		}
	}

	//记录某个用户流量
	public function recordUserFlow($uid , $file_size){
		$month = Date("Y-m") ;
		$used = $this->getUserFlow($uid) ;
		return D("FileFlow")->where(" uid = '%s'  and date_month = '$month' " , array($uid))->save(array(
			"used" => $used + intval($file_size) 
		));
	}

	public function deleteFile($file_id){
		$file_id = intval($file_id) ;
		$file = D("UploadFile")->where("file_id = '$file_id' ")->find();
		$real_url = $file['real_url'] ;
		$array = explode("/Public/Uploads/", $real_url) ;
		$file_path = "../Public/Uploads/".$array[1] ;
		if (file_exists($file_path)) {
			@unlink($file_path);
		}
		$this->deleteOss($real_url);
		D("UploadFile")->where(" file_id = '$file_id' ")->delete();
		D("FilePage")->where(" file_id = '$file_id' ")->delete();
		return true ;

	}

	//上传文件，返回url
	public function upload($_files , $file_key , $uid , $item_id = 0  , $page_id = 0  ){
		$uploadFile = $_files[$file_key] ;

		if( !$this->isAllowedFilename($_files[$file_key]['name']) ){
			return false;
		}

		$oss_open = D("Options")->get("oss_open" ) ;
		if ($oss_open) {
				$url = $this->uploadOss($uploadFile);
				if ($url) {
						$sign = md5($url.time().rand()) ;
						$insert = array(
						"sign" => $sign,
						"uid" => $uid,
						"item_id" => $item_id,
						"page_id" => $page_id,
						"display_name" => $uploadFile['name'],
						"file_type" => $uploadFile['type'],
						"file_size" => $uploadFile['size'],
						"real_url" => $url,
						"addtime" => time(),
						);
						$file_id = D("UploadFile")->add($insert);
						$insert = array(
							"file_id" => $file_id,
							"item_id" => $item_id,
							"page_id" => $page_id,
							"addtime" => time(),
							);
						$ret = D("FilePage")->add($insert);
						$url = server_url("api/attachment/visitFile",array("sign" => $sign)); 
					  return $url ;
				}
		}else{
			$upload = new \Think\Upload();// 实例化上传类
			$upload->maxSize  = 1003145728 ;// 设置附件上传大小
			$upload->rootPath = './../Public/Uploads/';// 设置附件上传目录
			$upload->savePath = '';// 设置附件上传子目录
			$info = $upload->uploadOne($uploadFile) ;
			if(!$info) {// 上传错误提示错误信息
				var_dump($upload->getError());
				return;
			}else{// 上传成功 获取上传文件信息
				$url = site_url().'/Public/Uploads/'.$info['savepath'].$info['savename'] ;
				$sign = md5($url.time().rand()) ;
				$insert = array(
					"sign" => $sign,
					"uid" => $uid,
					"item_id" => $item_id,
					"page_id" => $page_id,
					"display_name" => $uploadFile['name'],
					"file_type" => $uploadFile['type'],
					"file_size" => $uploadFile['size'],
					"real_url" => $url,
					"addtime" => time(),
					);
					$file_id = D("UploadFile")->add($insert);
					$insert = array(
						"file_id" => $file_id,
						"item_id" => $item_id,
						"page_id" => $page_id,
						"addtime" => time(),
						);
					$ret = D("FilePage")->add($insert);
				$url = server_url("api/attachment/visitFile",array("sign" => $sign));
				return $url ;
			}
		}
		return false;
	}

  	//上传到oss。参数$uploadFile是文件上传流，如$_FILES['file'] .也可以自己拼凑
	public function uploadOss($uploadFile){
		$oss_setting_json = D("Options")->get("oss_setting") ;
		$oss_setting = json_decode($oss_setting_json,1);

		if ($oss_setting && $oss_setting['oss_type'] && ( $oss_setting['oss_type'] == 's3_storage' || $oss_setting['oss_type'] == 'aliyun') ) {

			return $this->uploadS3($uploadFile , $oss_setting);

		}

		if ($oss_setting && $oss_setting['oss_type'] && $oss_setting['oss_type'] == 'qiniu') {

			$oss_setting['endpoint'] = $this->getQiuniuEndpointByKey($oss_setting['key'] , $oss_setting['bucket']);
			return $this->uploadS3($uploadFile , $oss_setting); 

		}
		// 腾讯云
		if ($oss_setting && $oss_setting['oss_type'] && $oss_setting['oss_type'] == 'qcloud') {
			// 腾讯云，一开始让用户填写region而没填写endpoint，所以要自己拼接
			$oss_setting['endpoint'] = "https://cos.{$oss_setting['region']}.myqcloud.com";
			// 腾讯云的SecretId相当于s3的key， secretKey相当于s3的secret
			$oss_setting['key'] = $oss_setting['secretId']  ;
			$oss_setting['secret'] = $oss_setting['secretKey']  ;
			return $this->uploadS3($uploadFile , $oss_setting); 
		}


		return false ;
	}

	// 通过s3协议上传
	// 注意传进来的oss_setting数组需要先转换成合法格式
	public function uploadS3($uploadFile , $oss_setting){

		$ext = strrchr($uploadFile['name'], '.'); //获取扩展名
		$oss_path = "showdoc_".get_rand_str().$ext;

		// 如果不包含协议头，自己给它补充
		if(!strstr($oss_setting['endpoint'] , '://')){
			$oss_setting['endpoint'] = 'https://'.$oss_setting['endpoint'] ;
		}

		$s3 = new S3Client([
			'accessKeyId' => $oss_setting['key'],
			'accessKeySecret' => $oss_setting['secret'] ,
			'endpoint' => $oss_setting['endpoint'] ,
			'sendChunkedBody' => false
		]);
	
		// Send a PutObject request and get the result object.
		$resObj = $s3->putObject([
			'Bucket' => $oss_setting['bucket'],
			'Key'    => $oss_path,
			'Body'   => fopen($uploadFile['tmp_name'], 'rb')
		]);

		// 不抛出异常，默认就是成功的

		if ($oss_setting['domain']) {
			return $oss_setting['protocol'] . '://'.$oss_setting['domain']."/".$oss_path ;
		}else{
			$tmp_array = parse_url($oss_setting['endpoint']);
			$endpoint_host = $tmp_array['host'] ;
			return 'https://'.$oss_setting['bucket'].'.'.$endpoint_host.'/'.$oss_path;
		}
	}

  	//从oss中删除
	public function deleteOss($file_url){
		$oss_setting_json = D("Options")->get("oss_setting") ;
		$oss_setting = json_decode($oss_setting_json,1);
		if ($oss_setting && $oss_setting['oss_type'] && ( $oss_setting['oss_type'] == 's3_storage' || $oss_setting['oss_type'] == 'aliyun') ) {
			return $this->deleteS3($file_url , $oss_setting);
		}

		if ($oss_setting && $oss_setting['oss_type'] && $oss_setting['oss_type'] == 'qiniu') {
			$oss_setting['endpoint'] = $this->getQiuniuEndpointByKey($oss_setting['key'] , $oss_setting['bucket']);
			return $this->deleteS3($file_url , $oss_setting); 
		}
		//var_dump($config);
		// 腾讯云
		if ($oss_setting && $oss_setting['oss_type'] && $oss_setting['oss_type'] == 'qcloud') {

			// 腾讯云，一开始让用户填写region而没填写endpoint，所以要自己拼接
			$oss_setting['endpoint'] = "https://cos.{$oss_setting['region']}.myqcloud.com";
			// 腾讯云的SecretId相当于s3的key， secretKey相当于s3的secret
			$oss_setting['key'] = $oss_setting['secretId']  ;
			$oss_setting['secret'] = $oss_setting['secretKey']  ;
			return $this->deleteS3($file_url , $oss_setting); 

		}


		return false ;
	}

	// 通过s3协议删除
	// 注意传进来的oss_setting数组需要先转换成合法格式
	public function deleteS3($file_url , $oss_setting){

		$array = parse_url($file_url) ;
		$file = $array['path'] ;  // 得到的是url中的路径，例如/path_.txt
		$file = substr($file, 1); // 要把路径前的/去掉，才是得到文件名path_.txt
		// 如果不包含协议头，自己给它补充
		if(!strstr($oss_setting['endpoint'] , '://')){
			$oss_setting['endpoint'] = 'https://'.$oss_setting['endpoint'] ;
		}

		$s3 = new S3Client([
			'accessKeyId' => $oss_setting['key'],
			'accessKeySecret' => $oss_setting['secret'] ,
			'endpoint' => $oss_setting['endpoint'] ,
		]);
	
		// Send a PutObject request and get the result object.
		$resObj = $s3->deleteObject([
			'Bucket' => $oss_setting['bucket'],
			'Key'    => $file,
		]);

		// 不抛出异常，默认就是成功的


	}

	// 由于历史原因，当初没有让用户填写七牛云的region。而且即使填写了，也不能直接获取到七牛云s3兼容协议上传的endpoint
	// 所以，需要自己调接口查询然后拼凑。七牛这个坑货。
	public function getQiuniuEndpointByKey($key,$bucket){

		$query_url = "https://api.qiniu.com/v2/query?ak={$key}&bucket={$bucket}";
		$res = http_post($query_url,array());

		$array = json_decode($res,true) ;
		// var_dump($array);exit();
		if($array && $array['region'] ){
			switch ($array['region']) {
				case 'z0':
					return 'https://s3-cn-east-1.qiniucs.com';
					break;
				case 'z1':
					return 'https://s3-cn-north-1.qiniucs.com';
					break;
				case 'z2':
					return 'https://s3-cn-south-1.qiniucs.com';
					break;
				case 'na0':
					return 'https://s3-us-north-1.qiniucs.com';
					break;
				case 'as0':
					return 'https://s3-ap-southeast-1.qiniucs.com';
					break;
				default:
					return false;
					break;
			}

		}

	}

	// 判断文件名是否包含危险的扩展名
	// 准备弃用。因为一个个ban太麻烦了。准备改用白名单机制
	public function isDangerFilename($filename){

		$isDangerStr = function ($filename , $keyword){
			if(strstr(strip_tags(strtolower( $filename )), $keyword) ){
				return true ;
			}
			return false;
		};
		if (
			 $isDangerStr($filename , ".php")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".svg")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".htm")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".shtm")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , "%")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".xml")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".xxhtml")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".asp")			
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".xsl")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".aspx")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".xsd")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".asa")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".cshtml")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , ".axd")
			|| $isDangerStr($filename , "htm")
		) {
			return true;
		}
	
		return false;
	}

	// 判断上传的文件扩展名是否处于白名单内
	public function isAllowedFilename($filename){
		$allow_array = array(
			'.jpg','.jpeg','.png','.bmp','.gif','.ico','.webp',
			'.mp3','.wav','.m4a','.ogg','.webma','.mp4','.flv',
			'.mov','.webmv','.m3u8a','.flac','.mkv',
			'.zip','.tar','.gz','.tgz','.ipa','.apk','.rar','.iso','.bz2','.epub',
			'.pdf','.ofd','.swf','.epub','.xps',
			'.doc','.docx','.odt','.rtf','.docm','.dotm','.dot','.dotx','.wps','.wpt',
			'.ppt','.pptx','.xls','.xlsx','.txt','.md','.psd','.csv',
			'.cer','.ppt','.pub','.properties','.json','.css',
			) ;

		$ext = strtolower(substr($filename,strripos($filename,'.')) ); //获取文件扩展名（转为小写后）
		if(in_array( $ext , $allow_array ) ){
			return true ;
		}
		return false;
	}

}
